no_seed_reason: built-in image_gen does not expose a stable numeric seed in this environment; source_default_path and workflow metadata are recorded in the workflow file
prompt: Cut-ready fantasy RPG blank UI base source sheet for Rune Marches with only four isolated UI assets in a 2x2 grid: large modal panel, tall journal panel, medium idle button, medium disabled button. Flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, large gutters, no text, no center-edge ornaments, corner caps only.
negative_prompt: text, numbers, fake letters, glyphs, watermark, logos, icons inside buttons, character art, map art, central ornaments, center-edge ornaments, cropped items, shadows on background, decorative objects outside corners
source_family_role: blank UI kit sheet accepted intake
rejected_candidate_notes: Accepted generated blank UI bases after border-connected chroma normalization. Runtime crop manifest, slice9 preview, edge proof, pixel audit, slice9 design policy audit, and source-derivation audit pass for this source.
